title: Vitekorchis obryzata
intro: I couldn't find any information on the plant 'Vitekorchis obryzata.'
taxonomy: Vitekorchis obryzata belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This epiphytic orchid is a species of orchid that is native to Southeast Asia. The classification of Vitekorchis obryzata includes its genus within the subtribe Orchidinae. Further classification places the genus within the tribe Orchideae. Vitekorchis obryzata's classification also includes its order within the Asparagales.
